description: A CRO specialist wants to propose a new A/B test for the checkout page.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the checkout funnel and identify the step with the highest drop-off rate.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds that the 'shipping information' step has the highest exit rate.

nodes.task_description: Formulate a hypothesis in the 'If we..., then..., because...' format.

expected_outcome.value: Agent writes a clear hypothesis: 'If we change the CTA button color from blue to orange, then the conversion rate will increase, because orange has higher contrast and will draw more attention.'

nodes.task_description: Create a mock-up of the proposed change (the 'B' version).

expected_outcome.value: Agent designs a visual representation of the test variant.
